Career Application Form – Administrative Assistant

Administrative Assistant

The administrative side of Old Dominion handles all of the non-clinical parts of running a busy equine veterinary practice. Clients often call in their moment of need and they want to connect with someone who is both caring and professional.

The positions are often full time with benefits but other part time positions become available.

The admin team prides themselves on creating a supportive and collaborative work environment. If you bring drama to work, this job is not for you!
Some of the duties might include: assisting clients, answering phones, client account maintenance, accounts receivable related functions, processing and uploading lab work, organizing equipment repairs, supporting doctors and other staff, and helping with other office maintenance needs. You will be cross trained in all areas of the administrative office.

Full-time positions include paid health and dental insurance, employee discount, 401K matching, PTO, and paid holidays. The starting wage depends on your benefit package and previous work experience.

Work Location: In person only

  • This field is for validation purposes and should be left unchanged.

Location

6539 Gordonsville Rd
Keswick, VA 22947

Phone: (434) 951-9225

Email: office.odea@gmail.com

Office Hours

Monday – Friday: 7:30 am – 5:00 pm
Saturday & Sunday: Closed

AVAILABLE 24/7 FOR EMERGENCIES
